strategy: Small Death boss (4630) that is stunable and beguilable. Hit with Life (+50%); never Death (80% resist).
Every damage spell you cast makes him interrupt a Shield of that school on himself, so soft hits get blunted. Over-stack blades and one-shot him, or bring Pierce or Shatter to strip the shield.
Avoid blades and Damage Globals. The first puts a Tower Shield on him, then Plague, Legion Shield, and Virulent Plague on successive casts, walling you off and weakening your hits.
Do not use DoTs; he answers them with Mass Triage.
Beguile or stun him to buy a free setup round, then land one big blade-stacked Life hit through the shield.
cheatNotes: Late joiners lose 2 pips to Mana Burn. Be in on round 1.
Any damage spell makes him self-shield in that exact school before your hit fully lands. Bring Pierce or Shatter, or over-stack so the shot kills anyway.
Multi-hit spells give him a shield per hit, so a many-hit Storm spell just walls itself. Prefer one big single hit.
Balance damage gets him a Tower Shield instead of a school shield, still a -50%, so pierce through it.
Cast a DoT and he Mass Triages it away. Skip damage-over-time here.
The first blade or Damage Global anyone casts puts a Tower Shield on him. Minimize globals.
The second blade or global makes him Plague you, cutting your damage. Keep charm counts low.
The third blade or global gives him a Legion Shield. Do not feed the cycle.
The fourth blade or global drops a Virulent Plague on you. Try to finish before stacking this many globals.
A fifth blade or global just restarts the cycle at Tower Shield, so there is no burning through it. Hit before you over-cast globals.
